title: Lint: Unary negate does not optionally expand by one bit like addition does

features.name: unary negate on signed signal width expansion
features.description: Code should include a unary negate operation on a signed signal where the result width is kept the same as the operand width without proper expansion for two's complement representation

features.name: binary addition with width expansion
features.description: Code should include a binary addition between two signed values of equal width where the result width is expanded by one bit to avoid overflow

features.name: chained addition with cumulative width expansion
features.description: Code should include chained addition of three signed signals where cumulative width expansion should apply to the result
